arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy has raised his voice to Leicester City players every week
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy did not deny raising his voice at his players, instead admitting it’s happened a couple of times a week since he took charge two months ago. Ruud van Nistelrooy has admitted to raising his voice at Leicester City players – but believes it is necessary to improve the standards within the team as they battle against the drop.

arts.ttl: Tottenham given Ange Postecoglou sack advice - 'they've gone backwards'
arts.sum: Tottenham go into Sunday's crunch clash with Leicester on the back of five Premier League defeats in their last six games

arts.ttl: The Tottenham transfer question Postecoglou does not ask as he drops Romero and Van de Ven hint
arts.sum: Although Tottenham's season may not have gone to plan with the team currently 15th in the Premier League table after a dismal run of form, Postecoglou stated: "I am absolutely 100 per cent confident that we are in a much better place in all areas of the club today than we were when I started" . A pivotal month for the football club with new signings needing to be finalised amid a host of injuries to key players, Spurs have only signed Antonin Kinsky so far in the winter market.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Tottenham vs Leicester live on TV in UK today?
arts.sum: Spurs looking to build on midweek win when Foxes come to town

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Richarlison must now step up for Ange Postecoglou after summer transfer disaster
arts.sum: Keeping Richarlison in the summer amid interest from Saudi Arabia has not worked out for Spurs

arts.ttl: Why isn't Tottenham vs Leicester live on TV in UK today?
arts.sum: Spurs looking to build on midweek win when Foxes come to town

arts.ttl: Why is Tottenham vs Leicester not on TV in UK? How to watch Premier League match
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in dire need of a win as they host Leicester City on this afternoon, though the Premier League clash will not be broadcast live in the UK

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Tottenham's Premier League clash with Leicester, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: 'It felt amazing, a dream come true' - Callum Olusesi on making his Spurs debut
arts.sum: A player who he has risen through the ranks alongside, Cal has been good friends with fellow Academy graduate Mikey Moore since the pair were just five-years-old so, to be together on the pitch at the same time for that moment made the debut just that bit more special. While the night will be one Callum will never forget, one part of it that will perhaps have made it that bit more special is the fact that one of his childhood best mates was also on the pitch at the same time.
